name: sediment
description: Sediment — a persistent community archaeology game for Reddit (Devvit).

scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/ui && npm run build -w packages/game && npm run build -w apps/web
scripts.test: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/ui && npm run build -w packages/game && npm run test -w packages/game --if-present && npm run test -w apps/web --if-present
